# kCGWindowOwnerPID | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Graphics ](/documentation/coregraphics)

- [ kCGWindowOwnerPID ](/documentation/CoreGraphics/kCGWindowOwnerPID)

-  kCGWindowOwnerPID 

Global Variable# kCGWindowOwnerPID

Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+

```
let kCGWindowOwnerPID: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CoreGraphics/kCGWindowOwnerPID#Discussion)

The value for this key is a [`CFNumber`](/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber) type (encoded as [`CFNumberType.intType`](/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumberType/intType)) that contains the process ID of the application that owns the window.

## [See Also](/documentation/CoreGraphics/kCGWindowOwnerPID#see-also)

### [Constants](/documentation/CoreGraphics/kCGWindowOwnerPID#Constants)

[`class let colorSpace: CFString`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgdisplaystream/colorspace)This key specifies the color space of the output buffer. If this key is not included in the dictionary, the output buffer uses the same color space as the display.
